signals.reasoning: The live SOL short has now dropped to about 39% peak PnL retention and remains flagged urgent. Under a live veto headline that still leans relief-style, this is firmly a protect-the-remainder cover rather than a thesis hold.
BTC is still holding up on the relief headline, which keeps fresh bearish follow-ons unattractive under veto.
ETH remains part of the broader recovery tape, so it does not offer a cleaner next trade than simply covering the live SOL short.
TST is still too extended and unstable to touch during an active geopolitical event cycle.
MERL is just a rebound and does not offer a cleaner edge than the main management decision already in front of us.
WCT is extended and event-sensitive, making it a poor candidate for a fresh decision under veto.
CAKE is constructive, but the move is already underway and there is no reason to add fresh risk while the headline regime is unstable.
ORDI looks like a rebound rather than a standout fresh edge. Watch-only is cleaner.
ZEREBRO remains noisy and high beta, so it is not where disciplined management should go next.
VVV still reads more like recovery than a fresh clean continuation. It is not a better use of attention than the open SOL decision.
CHILLGUY remains a recovery name rather than a clean new signal. No reason to force it.
